sections.name: opening
sections.template:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the {job_title} position at {company}.

sections.name: body
sections.template: My experience with {skills} aligns perfectly with your requirements. In my previous role at {previous_company}, I {achievement}.

sections.name: closing
sections.template: Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to {company}.
